description_long: This is a classic claw hammer with a robust, metallic head and a straight, elongated handle. The head features a flat striking face on one side for driving nails and a curved claw on the opposite side for prying and removing nails. The handle is smooth, straight, and tapers slightly towards the end, providing a comfortable grip for the user. The entire object appears to be made from a single material, likely metal, giving it a uniform, dark gray finish. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained. The hammer's design is utilitarian and suitable for a variety of construction or repair tasks in urban environments.
description: A dark gray claw hammer with a smooth, straight handle and a metallic head featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, including the flat striking face and the pronounced curved claw.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow width of the hammer head and handle, with the claw and striking face aligned.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the claw and striking face visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the hammer head and the handle's width, with the claw tips visible.
attribute_handle_type: straight steel handle, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal
